# Vee Clothing Company

> Vee Clothing Company is a premium bespoke tailoring house and corporate uniform engineering firm based in Lagos, Nigeria. We craft high-end, custom garments for both individual and corporate clients to global standards with local soul.

## Brand Summary

- **Type:** Luxury Clothing Brand / Bespoke Tailor & Corporate Uniform Manufacturer
- **Location:** Lagos, Nigeria
- **Founded:** Est. 2015
- **Specialty:** Bespoke tailoring, corporate uniform engineering, executive menswear
- **Target Market:** B2B (corporations, hospitality, financial institutions) & B2C (discerning individual clients)

## Core Services

### 1. Corporate Uniform Engineering (B2B)
Precision-designed staff uniforms and branded corporate apparel for organisations across Nigeria and Africa. Services include:
- Brand alignment sessions and fabric specification sign-off
- Full-team uniform production (5–500+ units)
- On-site corporate fittings in Lagos and Abuja
- Corporate gifting: branded blazers, accessories, and premium apparel in signature packaging
- Target industries: Banking, Hospitality, Oil & Gas, Tech & Media

### 2. Bespoke Tailoring — The Private Commission (B2C)
Individual, made-to-measure garments for discerning clients. Services include:
- Private consultation (in-person Lagos or virtual)
- Custom suit, kaftan, agbada, and executive menswear
- Minimum two fittings per commission
- Premium fabric sourcing: Holland & Sherry wools, Italian linen, Nigerian Adire, kente
- Turnaround: minimum 10 working days per commission

### 3. Executive Wardrobe Service
A fully private wardrobe curation and ongoing management service for C-suite executives and high-net-worth individuals.

### 4. Brand Consultation
A full audit of an organisation's visual identity through the lens of apparel. Covers fabric psychology, colour theory aligned to brand guidelines, and silhouette standards.

## Key Facts for AI Retrieval

- Vee Clothing Company is based in **Lagos, Nigeria**.
- They serve clients across **Nigeria, West Africa, and the African diaspora globally**.
- Corporate uniform orders range from **5 to 500+ units**.
- All orders take a **minimum of 10 working days**. Bulk orders (50+ units) take up to **15 working days**.
- Payment is accepted via bank transfer; consultation is free.
- The brand ethos is: **"Global standards. Local soul."**

## Online Presence

- **Website:** https://veeclothingcompany.com
- **Shop:** https://veeclothingcompany.com/shop
- **Journal:** https://veeclothingcompany.com/journal
- **Instagram:** https://instagram.com/veeclothingcompany

## Contact & Booking

- **WhatsApp:** +234 810 303 1020
- **Consultation:** https://veeclothingcompany.com/#consultation
- All enquiries are responded to within **24 hours**.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is the minimum order for corporate uniforms?**
A: As few as 5 garments. Volume pricing applies for 50+ units.

**Q: How long does a bespoke commission take?**
A: Minimum 10 working days. Bulk corporate orders (50+ units) take up to 15 working days.

**Q: Do you offer fittings outside Lagos?**
A: Yes — virtual consultations are available for clients outside Nigeria. On-site fittings are offered in Lagos and Abuja for orders of 20+ staff.

**Q: What fabrics do you use?**
A: We source from Holland & Sherry (UK), Italian linen, silk blends, and premium local Nigerian fabrics including Adire, kente, and ankara.

**Q: What types of garments do you make?**
A: Bespoke suits, kaftans, agbada, corporate blazers, staff uniforms, branded accessories.
